title: Tribal Member Awards nominations deadline extended
summary: The Tribal Council has extended the deadline for nominations until September 30, 2021, for the following Kenaitze Tribal Member of the Year Award categories: Kenaitze Tribal Member Elder Recognition Award: Recognizes a Tribal Member who has shown dedication to Alaska Native culture, heritage and communities.
